src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/reque.general_idea: Add @Param annotations to map renamed camelCase fields to their original snake_case query parameters for Feign client compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.0 to 3.3.6 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Update WireMock groupId from com.github.tomakehurst to org.wiremock to match the new artifact location in version 3.x.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the CircleCI Docker image from OpenJDK 11 to OpenJDK 17 to align with the project's Java version migration.
